title: The Affordable Homes Programme annual report 2024 to 2025
body: "The Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government delivers the Affordable Homes Programmes to increase the supply of affordable housing. These programmes deliver housing for sale or rent intended for those whose needs the market does not meet.  The Greater London Authority (GLA) administers funding and manages delivery for these programmes in London. Homes England performs this role in all other English Regions. "
